message:
docs(sdk): add basic_sdk example for programmatic embedding (#40)

Demonstrates creating an in-process agent session via the existing
pi::sdk API surface: SessionOptions, create_agent_session(),
AgentSessionHandle.prompt(), streaming AgentEvent handling, typed
tool hooks, and session state inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
